SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2023 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-13-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ***LAST CONTINUANCE*** PLAINTIFF GLENN HOPKINS JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID JENKINS, GENERAL MANAGER. ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE: PLAINTIFF IS TO GET STATUS FROM BEST BUY ON IMAC RETURN TO BEST BUY. DEFENDANT IS TO REVIEW VIDEO FROM AUGUST 8TH AND AUGUST 11TH DELIVERIES, AND RETRIEVE ADDITIONAL INFORMATION FROM HELLO PACKAGE DELIVERY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF BOTH PARTIES TO MAY-08-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GLENN HOPKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANIELLE REYES (PROPERTY SALES MANAGER). PLAINTIFF REQUESTS FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BRING IN HIS EVIDENCE AND DEFENDANT ALSO REQUESTS FOR A CONTINUANCE DUE TO THE TWO EMPLOYEES THAT HAVE PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE OF THE CASE THAT WERE GOING TO APPEAR FOR TODAY'S HEARING CANNOT APPEAR DUE TO MEDICAL ISSUE. CONTINUED WAS GRANTED AT THE REQUEST OF BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S CONTACT INFORMATION (ADDRESS) WAS GIVEN IN COURT TO DEFENDANT ON A POSTED NOTE FOR PARTIES TO EXCHANGE INFORMATION PRIOR TO THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAVID JENKINS, GENERAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE NOV-13-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
